name: The New York Times
philosophy: Canonical American newspaper online — Cheltenham masthead, Imperial body, Franklin Gothic bylines, hairline-grid rhythm, color used only as section accent and breaking-news red.

design_language.motion_signature: Almost none. 120ms hover color shift on links; breaking-news ribbon subtle pulse when live.

trademark_signals: Cheltenham masthead — most recognized newspaper wordmark online
Imperial body text at 18px — the text size itself is the brand
Franklin Gothic small caps for bylines and section labels
Section-specific accent colors (recipe green, opinion blue)
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add animated illustrations in standard news content
Don't render the homepage in dark mode
